name: curated_radio
description: Separate Volumio browse source for curated, verified, and discovered web radio streams
author: MKlee333 and contributors

volumio_info.details: Adds a separate Browse source with verified streams, discovered findings, review queues, inactive stations, and grouped radio views backed by a local SQLite database.
volumio_info.changelog: 0.4.0 Prefer highest-bitrate stream variants, show quality labels, and add saved Interesting Stations.
